name: Element 29 Resources Inc.
description: Element 29 Resources Inc. is an emerging copper exploration and development company focused on making new discoveries and advancing its high-quality portfolio of copper projects in Peru. The company's principal assets include the Elida copper-molybdenum porphyry project in central Peru and the Flor de Cobre copper porphyry project in southern Peru. Element 29 is dedicated to creating value for its shareholders through systematic exploration and development of these highly prospective copper assets in a premier mining jurisdiction.
